The quantity of the feeds may be increased, after the illness has subsided, till the original weight is regained. How do infections in children lead to malnutrition? How should a child be fed during illness? 35 What should be done during diarrhea? How important is the problem of lactose intolerance? Diarrhea is a common childhood disease which leads to dehydration and sometimes death. The child requires prompt correction of fluid and electrolyte loss using oral rehydration solution (ORS) along with appropriate/adequate feeding.
